summary: Iteration 151: Comprehensive Phase 2 Contraction Timer testing complete. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Phase 2 UI elements now rendering correctly - the visibility issues from iteration 150 are FIXED. All modals (Settings, Notes, Charts, History, Add Manual) working. Birth word preference, alert thresholds, water breaking, session notes, and charts all functional.

integration_issues.issue: Clipboard writeText permission denied in automated testing environment - shows error modal 'Failed to execute writeText on Clipboard'. Works in normal browser use, just a test environment limitation.

backend_api_tests.details: All Phase 2 backend APIs working: GET/PUT /preferences, POST/DELETE /water-broke, PUT /notes, PUT /mark-primary, GET /chart-data

water_breaking.details: Record and clear water breaking working, team notification sent

session_notes.details: Session notes update working - shows 'Feeling calm and focused' in modal

chart_data.details: Charts rendering with react-native-chart-kit - Duration Over Time and Interval Over Time charts displaying correctly

frontend_ui.details: All Phase 2 UI elements visible: headerRow with settings gear, water broke banner, secondary actions (Notes, Charts), all modals working

modals_tested.settings_modal: PASSED - Shows birth word options (Contractions/Surges/Waves) and alert thresholds (5-1-1, 4-1-1, 3-1-1, No Alert)
modals_tested.notes_modal: PASSED - Shows Session Notes with text area and Save Notes button
modals_tested.charts_modal: PASSED - Shows Surges Charts with Duration Over Time and Interval Over Time line charts
modals_tested.history_modal: PASSED - Shows Surges History with contraction list (#1-#5), duration, interval, intensity badges, delete buttons
modals_tested.add_manual_modal: PASSED - Shows Add Contraction Manually form with Start Time, Duration, Intensity, Notes fields

critical_code_review_comments: Phase 2 UI visibility issues from iteration 150 are now FIXED - headerRow and secondaryActionsRow rendering correctly
Charts using react-native-chart-kit working well for web
Birth word preference properly reflected throughout UI (Surges Timer, Start Surge, Surges History, Surges Charts)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all Phase 2 features working, minor clipboard permission issue in test environment only)

seed_data_creation: Created test session with 5 contractions, water breaking recorded ('Clear fluid, moderate amount'), session notes ('Feeling calm and focused'), birth_word set to 'surges', alert_threshold set to '4-1-1'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Contraction Timer fully working. All backend APIs tested and passing. Frontend UI Phase 2 elements (settings modal, water broke banner, notes modal, charts modal with react-native-chart-kit) all working correctly. The visibility issues from iteration 150 are resolved. Test session was created for testing but not ended - can be used for future testing.

features_verified.birth_word_preference: WORKING - header shows 'Surges Timer', button shows 'Start Surge', history shows 'Surges History'
features_verified.alert_threshold_options: WORKING - 5-1-1 (Standard), 4-1-1 (Earlier), 3-1-1 (Closer), No Alert options available in settings
features_verified.water_breaking_tracking: WORKING - banner shows 'Water broke at 8:46 PM - Clear fluid, moderate amount'
features_verified.session_notes: WORKING - notes modal shows saved notes and Save Notes button
features_verified.charts_react_native_chart_kit: WORKING - Duration Over Time (seconds) and Interval Over Time (minutes) charts rendering
features_verified.history_with_intensity: WORKING - shows contractions with time, duration, interval, MODERATE intensity badges
features_verified.manual_add: WORKING - form with Start Time, Duration, Intensity selection, Notes
features_verified.settings_gear_icon: WORKING - visible in top right corner, opens settings modal on click
